system.effect: Another Minion that hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes a turn. That character can't use Team Up this turn.
Abilities can't increase a Minion's Max HP. Abilities granted by Templates deal half damage and no bonus damage.
Replaces Melee Attack

Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Melee Attack performs a Movement Action.
Effect: Perform Melee Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
An adjacent non-Minion allied character gains +1 Advantage on their next Attack Roll.

Requires Melee Attack.
Melee Attack gains +1 Range.
If the Minion Resists an effect that would deal half damage: the Minion takes no damage.
When this minion is defeated: adjacent characters take [tier]+2 damage.

• At the end of a turn granted by Team Up: Another Minion that hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes a turn. That character can't use Team Up this turn.
  • When a hostile character defeats this minion during their turn: that character gains (?). A character can only gain AP this way 1/Round.

Perform Take Cover only as the last Action in a turn.
Attacks against the Minion have +1 Disadvantage until the start of its next turn.
If the target has no adjacent allies, Backstab has +1 Advantage and On Hit: Bleeding 1+[tier].

Condition: The Assassin takes damage.
Effect: The Assassin performs Evade and moves an extra tile when Evading this way.
The Assassin can move diagonally.

Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or is Stunned +1.
If the target has no adjacent allies: reduce the cost of Sap to 1 AP.
Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or is Immobilized until the end of their next turn.

• Flurry
  • Deals Piercing Damage.
  • On Hit: Bleeding +1.
The Assassin gains Concealment 6 until the end of its next turn.
This turn, while moving, the Assassin is Flying.

Condition: An adjacent hostile character with no adjacent allies performs a Movement Action.

Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll or loses that Movement Action and becomes Prone.
Backstab's 1/Round limit is ignored against characters with no adjacent allies.

• Perform Death Attack of Opportunity only while the Assassin is adjacent to exactly one hostile character.
  • Condition: An adjacent hostile character performs a Movement Action.
  • Effect: Perform Backstab on the triggering character before the triggering Action. It gains On Damage: Bleeding +1.
Target allied character clears a hostile Condition.
Target allied character receives Healing equal to their Max HP (half for Elite/Legendary).

Condition: An allied character receives a hostile Condition.
Effect: The Medic moves toward that character.
Deals Piercing Damage. On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Vulnerable until they perform Refocus.
1/Round. Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Prone.
1/Round. A target allied character performs Refocus if able.
The Medic's Support Actions have Range 4.
The Medic's Spell Actions aren't Spells and don't provoke Reactions.
Heal costs (◆◆) but instead provides Regeneration X where X is half the target's missing HP.
Target allied character gains Barrier [tier]+2. This Barrier doesn't end as turns end.
+1 Disadvantage. On Hit: The Beast can perform Clamp as a Free Action. Against an Immobilized character: +1 Advantage and +3 Bonus Damage.
Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or is Immobilized until they are no longer adjacent to the Beast.

1/Round. Perform Thrash only while a hostile character is Immobilized by Clamp. The Beast and the Immobilized character simultaneously move 1 tile in any direction. This movement doesn't provoke Reactions.

1/Encounter. The Beast moves twice its SPD. During this movement: it can't change directions, passes through hostile characters, has Damage Resistance, ignores Difficult Terrain, and hostile characters it becomes adjacent to make a Resistance Roll, becoming Prone on a failure. At the end of this movement: the Beast can perform Clamp as a Free Action.
Perform Ragdoll only if a hostile character was Immobilized by Clamp at the beginning of the Beast's turn. The Immobilized character suffers Push 4
For the rest of the encounter: The Beast has 0 Armor and can't receive Healing or be targeted by Support Actions. It gains +1 SPD and gains (◆) at the beginning of each of its turns.
Characters Immobilized by the Beast's Clamp have +1 Disadvantage on Attack Rolls and Resistance Rolls.
When the Beast's Melee Attack hits a character Immobilized by Clamp: That character is Sundered for the rest of the encounter.
On Hit: Push 1. Target makes a Resistance Roll or falls Prone.

1/Turn. Condition: The Guardian takes damage.
Effect: Deal [tier]+1 damage to the attacker within Range 2.
Adjacent tiles are Difficult Terrain for hostile characters.
The Guardian and adjacent allies have Damage Resistance. This doesn't apply while the Guardian is Prone or Immobilized.
All characters within Range 2 make a Resistance Roll, becoming Prone and Stunned +1 on a failure. Adjacent allied characters have +1 Advantage on the Resistance Roll.
On Hit: Repeat the attack with Flurry against a different character within Range 2 of the previous target. This effect can occur no more than [tier]+1 times.

Target allied character becomes Invulnerable until the start of the Guardian's next turn, or until the Guardian is defeated or moves beyond Range 3. While this is active: The Guardian loses Unbreakable.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Heavy Attack performs a Movement Action.
Effect: Perform Heavy Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
Counterattack deals Piercing Damage.
The first time the Guardian is hit by an Attack each round: prevent all damage and bonus damage from that Attack.
+1 Advantage when not the Sentinel's turn.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within Range 2 performs a Movement Action.
Effect: Perform Melee Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
The next time the Sentinel performs Melee Attack against a target this turn the Sentinel performs Melee Attack twice against that target instead.
The Sentinel is Immobilized until Combat Reflexes is deactivated (◆◆). While active: Attack of Opportunity triggers 1/Turn instead of 1/Round.

1/Round. Condition: The Sentinel is dealt any amount of damage and bonus damage from a single source.
Effect: The Sentinel gains Damage Resistance against the triggering damage. An adjacent non-Minion allied character gains +1 Advantage on their next Attack Roll.
Attack of Opportunity gains On Hit: The target is Immobilized until the start of their next turn.
Melee Attack gains +1 Range.
Attack of Opportunity has the following additional Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Melee Attack performs a Spell Action.
Attack of Opportunity has the following additional Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Melee Attack performs an Action that targets an adjacent allied character.
The Sentinel ignores Difficult Terrain.
Only available at Initiative. +1 Advantage. X equals half the target's Max HP. Deals Piercing Chaos Damage.
Reduces the AP Cost of the next Executioner's Swing by 1.
Flurry. On Hit: Pull the target adjacent to the Executioner.
Adjacent hostile characters can't move or be moved except by their own Actions.
Flurry. 1/Round. On Hit: The target is Silenced until the end of their next turn. (A Silenced character can't perform Spell Actions.)
The Executioner has Damage Resistance while adjacent to a hostile character.
When the Executioner reduces a hostile character to 0 HP hostile characters in a Size 3 Area centered on the Executioner make a Resistance Roll

npcAbilities.name: Executioner: In the Name of God

system.effect: When the Executioner performs Executioner's Swing: X equals the target's maximum HP.
+1 Advantage against characters in Difficult Terrain. On Hit: Poisoned +1.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within the Spider's attack range performs a Movement Action.
Effect: Perform Swift Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
1/Encounter. Creates Difficult Terrain in a Size 1 Area within Range 3.
Ignores Difficult Terrain.
When the Spider's Difficult Terrain causes a hostile character to spend additional movement: That character is Poisoned +1. (No roll.)
Difficult Terrain created by the Spider's Snare requires one additional Speed of movement per tile entered.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character performs a Movement Action while within a Snare, or enters a Snare during movement.
Effect: The Spider performs a Movement Action. It must end this movement closer to the triggering character than it began.
At the beginning of the Spider's turn: Choose any number of Snares in play. For each chosen Snare move it to a tile within Range 2 of that Snare. (It doesn't cross the intervening distance.)
While within a Snare: The Spider has Concealment 3.
+1 Advantage against characters in Difficult Terrain. On Hit: Poisoned +2.
On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Addled.
Target takes [tier]+4 Chaos Damage at the end of their next turn unless they spend Focus.
Teleport up to Range 6. This movement doesn't provoke Reactions.
1/Round. On Hit: If the target has no Focus remaining deals bonus Chaos Damage equal to that character's maximum HP.
Target hostile character with less than half their maximum Focus remaining becomes Slowed +1. (No roll.)
1/Round. On Hit: Target performs Move in a direction of the Mindflayer's choice unless they spend [tier]+1 Focus.

A Mindleech Trap deploys in a free space and is triggered by the hostile character that moves into it. Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll or loses [tier]+2 Focus. Whether or not they Resist they become Immobilized until the end of their next turn if they have less than half their maximum Focus remaining.
A hostile character that spends Focus while adjacent to the Mindflayer takes that much Chaos Damage.
The Mindflayer has Damage Resistance from characters with less than half their maximum Focus remaining.
Compulsion targets all hostile characters in a Size 1 Area within range.
The Angel becomes Immobilized. Allied characters in a Size 2 Area centered on the Angel have +1 Advantage on Resistance Rolls, and attacks against them have +1 Disadvantage.
At the start of the Angel's turn it clears a hostile Condition.
1/Round. On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll. On a failure that character performs Move toward the Angel.
+1 Disadvantage if the Angel has performed an Attack this turn.
Target hostile character becomes Blinded 3 until the end of their next turn. (No roll.)
Hostile characters in Principality are Sundered.
A friendly character that begins their turn in Principality or moves into Principality for the first time during their turn receives 2 Healing.
Targets two Size 1 Areas. On Attack: The Invoker becomes Immobilized 1.
The Invoker's next Flame Strike knocks targets Prone on damage.
+1 Net Advantage on Flame Strike when targeting the same areas as the previous Flame Strike.
Treats obstructions as Cover when determining attack lines.
Damage Resistance from Melee Actions.

An Exploding Trap deploys in a free space and is triggered by the hostile character that moves into it. Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll or suffers [tier]+4 Damage and Push 2. A character that Resists suffers half damage and isn't pushed.
Teleport to a free tile within range. Blink doesn't provoke Reactions.
Flame Strike gains On Miss: The target suffers Bleeding +1. (No roll.)
Flame Strike becomes Charged and can only be performed with Initiative. On Damage: The target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Stunned +2.

The Invoker ignores Concealment and Stealth Actions. Flame Strike leaves a lingering Size 1 Area until the Invoker next performs Flame Strike. A character in this area loses Concealment and can't perform Stealth Actions.
1/Round. On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Dazed +1.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character's dice show exactly two 1s.
Effect: That character treats the other shown value as 0 on all future rolls.
The Aberration can move diagonally.
Damage and Conditions dealt by the Aberration also apply to the next hostile character in alphabetical order.
1/Round. Perform Destroy Summon only with Initiative. On Hit: The target Summoned character is reduced to 0 HP. (No roll.)
Adjacent hostile character makes a Resistance Roll. On a failure for the rest of the encounter: that character can't pay the Inspiration costs of non-Ultimate abilities.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within Range 4 is reduced to 0 HP.
Effect: For the rest of the Quest that character can't use a Narrative Tag of the Aberration's choice.

An Aberration can Hide only if it performed Hunker Down last turn. 1/Round. Condition: A hostile character begins their turn.
Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll. On a failure this turn that character can't target the Aberration with Actions that target only one character.
Backstab also inflicts Slowed +1 on a failed Resistance Roll.
The Aberration recovers half its maximum HP when performing Refocus.
The Aberration ignores Damage and Conditions from Actions that share a name with the last Action to inflict Damage or a Condition on the Aberration.
The Aberration ignores Difficult Terrain and can move through hostile characters.

When the Aberration becomes adjacent to a map edge: The Aberration may Teleport to the opposite map edge appearing in the nearest free tile. The Aberration ends the current Movement and loses all unspent AP.

• Flurry
  • After spending AP to perform Melee Attack: Repeat Melee Attack as a Free Action a number of times equal to the Duelist's level.

The Duelist marks a target. The Duelist treats the marked target as Sundered and has Damage Resistance from the marked target, and their attacks against the marked target have +1 Advantage. The mark lasts for the rest of the scene, until the marked target is reduced to 0 HP, or until this Action is performed again.

When the Marked target is reduced to 0 HP, recharge Duel.

Condition: A character hits the Duelist with the Attack Roll of a Melee Weapon Attack.

Effect: The Duelist makes an Attack Roll against that character. On a hit, the triggering attack roll misses instead.
The Duelist's attacks have On Critical Hit: The target chooses - they are Dazed 3, Slowed 2, or Immobilized 1. They can't choose a condition they have already.

• Flurry
  • On Hit: The Duelist may Move 2. The movement doesn't trigger Reactions.
Each round, the first Reaction the Duelist triggers has no effect.
